open_questions: Whether the employer will state the termination reason in writing.
Whether the draft agreement contains a broad waiver of all claims.

fact_timeline.description: HR proposed mutual termination and a one-time payment before any document was signed.

termination_assessment.worker_position: No resignation or waiver has been signed; request written terms and reserve rights.

evidence_directory.evidence_name: Separation agreement draft and version history
evidence_directory.lawful_source: worker copy, HR email, or document system lawfully accessible to the worker
evidence_directory.proof_purpose: agreement terms, payment date, waiver language, and employer-proposed termination
evidence_directory.collection_note: Preserve full versions before signing and do not alter metadata.

evidence_directory.evidence_name: Bank, tax, and payslip records for wage basis
evidence_directory.lawful_source: bank records, tax app, payslips, and payroll emails
evidence_directory.proof_purpose: average monthly wage and economic compensation basis
evidence_directory.collection_note: Preserve the 12 months before termination or actual shorter service period.

negotiation_plan.ask_range_or_counteroffer: Start from itemized N plus unpaid/unclear items; avoid voluntary resignation wording.
switch_to_arbitration_triggers: Payment amount or payment date remains unclear.
Draft requires broad waiver before payment.

revision_requests: State amount, payment date, and tax/payment responsibility clearly.
Remove or narrow all-claims waiver before payment is completed.
claims_to_reserve: social insurance or housing fund disputes if any

arbitration_draft_pack.candidate_commission: Labor dispute arbitration commission at the place of contract performance or employer location, subject to local form check.
pre_filing_checks: Verify the current Shanghai local arbitration commission form and accepted filing channel.
Confirm jurisdiction by contract performance place or employer registered/location evidence.
Confirm respondent legal name, unified social credit code, and service address.
Attach numbered evidence copies matching evidence_directory_refs and redact unnecessary sensitive data.
Recheck limitation trigger date, claim amounts, and local filing copy requirements.
Have a lawyer or local professional review the draft before signing or filing.

lawful_collection_limits: Use only worker-accessible chats, emails, records, and third-party official records.
Do not copy company secrets, unrelated personal data, source code, or customer lists.
unsupported_assumptions: Employer's final legal reason is not confirmed until written notice or agreement terms are available.
local_verify_items: Shanghai local wage cap and arbitration filing form.
lawyer_check_items: Any non-compete or confidentiality clause tied to payment.

case_snapshot.employer_legal_name: Example AI Services Guangzhou Co., Ltd.
case_snapshot.worker_goal: verify economic layoff legality before signing settlement or resignation documents
open_questions: Whether the employer explained the layoff to employees or union 30 days in advance.
Whether the Guangzhou written report package and final layoff plan exist.

fact_timeline.description: Employer announced AI-driven restructuring and asked affected employees to sign settlement terms within 48 hours.

termination_assessment.worker_position: Do not sign broad waiver or personal-reason resignation before the report package, final plan, payment basis, and priority retention review are clarified.

evidence_directory.evidence_name: Guangzhou economic layoff report package and final plan
evidence_directory.lawful_source: written request to employer, HRSS report receipt if provided, final plan published to affected employees
evidence_directory.proof_purpose: economic layoff threshold, statutory reason, 30-day explanation, opinion handling, report content, and final plan consistency
evidence_directory.collection_note: Request copies or written confirmation; do not access employer systems beyond the worker's lawful permission.

evidence_directory.evidence_name: Priority retention and six-month rehire evidence
evidence_directory.lawful_source: worker contract term, family burden proof, public recruitment posts, and rehire notices received by the worker
evidence_directory.proof_purpose: priority retention status and later same-condition rehire priority
evidence_directory.collection_note: Use public or worker-accessible records only; separate same-role facts from assumptions.

negotiation_plan.ask_range_or_counteroffer: Ask for the statutory layoff report materials, final plan, and itemized N basis before discussing any waiver or settlement signature.
forbidden_phrases: 我放弃经济性裁员程序异议
switch_to_arbitration_triggers: Employer implements termination without report materials or final plan.
Agreement requires broad waiver before itemized payment is confirmed.
Replacement hiring suggests the layoff reason or priority review is disputed.

revision_requests: Remove personal-reason resignation wording if the employer is implementing an economic layoff.
Preserve claims tied to unpaid wages, local procedure, and later rehire priority until payment and documents are confirmed.
payment_safeguards: Late-payment consequence before any broad release.
claims_to_reserve: unpaid wage or social insurance items if any

lawful_collection_limits: Preserve worker-accessible notices, chats, public postings, and official records.
Do not copy source code, customer lists, internal confidential strategy files, or unrelated employee personal data.
unsupported_assumptions: AI transformation alone does not prove the statutory economic layoff path is valid or invalid without threshold, explanation, opinion, report, and final plan facts.
local_verify_items: Guangzhou district HRSS report form, receipt practice, and current local wage-cap source.
lawyer_check_items: Whether the layoff reaches statutory threshold.
Whether priority retention applies to this worker.

case_snapshot.worker_goal: prepare arbitration after wage arrears and coerced resignation pressure
open_questions: Whether the worker has sent a statutory resignation or written objection.
Whether social insurance arrears can be confirmed by official records.

fact_timeline.description: HR asked the worker to submit a personal-reason resignation while three months of wages remained unpaid.

termination_assessment.employer_stated_reason: cost control and voluntary resignation request
termination_assessment.worker_position: Refuse false personal-reason resignation; preserve wage arrears evidence and use only truthful statutory-breach wording if resigning.

evidence_directory.evidence_name: Wage arrears and employer breach evidence
evidence_directory.lawful_source: bank records, payslips, payroll emails, tax app, social insurance app, and worker-accessible HR messages
evidence_directory.proof_purpose: unpaid wage amount, statutory resignation basis, and employer breach timing
evidence_directory.collection_note: Match any resignation or objection wording to actual unpaid wage and social insurance records; do not rewrite history.

evidence_directory.evidence_name: Resignation or objection text and delivery proof
evidence_directory.lawful_source: truthful email, message, or letter sent by the worker
evidence_directory.proof_purpose: whether the worker resigned voluntarily, objected to pressure, or resigned based on statutory employer breaches
evidence_directory.collection_note: Use factual wording; keep delivery timestamp and recipient.

arbitration_draft_pack.candidate_commission: Labor dispute arbitration commission at the place of contract performance or employer location, subject to Hangzhou local form check.
pre_filing_checks: Verify the current Hangzhou local arbitration commission form and accepted filing channel.
Confirm jurisdiction by contract performance place or employer registered/location evidence.
Confirm respondent legal name, unified social credit code, and service address.
Attach numbered evidence copies matching evidence_directory_refs and redact unnecessary sensitive data.
Recheck limitation trigger date, claim amounts, and local filing copy requirements.
Have a lawyer or local professional review the draft before signing or filing.

lawful_collection_limits: Use worker-owned records, official third-party records, and worker-accessible communications.
Do not fabricate wage arrears, backdate resignation, or copy unrelated company files.
unsupported_assumptions: Economic compensation depends on truthful statutory-breach wording and evidence; a pure personal-reason resignation can weaken this claim.
local_verify_items: Hangzhou arbitration filing form and local commission jurisdiction requirements.
lawyer_check_items: Social insurance arrears claim path and administrative complaint route.
